risks.title: Ollama RAG rebuild may be slow or fail
risks.mitigation: If RAG rebuild fails or times out, document in report with failure reason; proceed with direct index/graph analysis for remaining metrics

risks.title: populate.js may hit Windows path normalization issues
risks.mitigation: Run from coderef-core project root; if STUB-INDEXING-ORCHESTRATOR-PATH-NORMALIZATION-001 issues surface, note in report and proceed with existing artifacts

risks.title: Expected improvements may not be reflected yet (fixes not built/deployed)
risks.mitigation: Check dist/ is built from latest source before running; if metrics don't show improvement, investigate and document root cause in report

risks.title: rag-search --max-tokens may not be implemented yet
risks.mitigation: Fix #6 is expected to have landed; if flag is rejected, document in report as remaining gap

dependencies: Ollama (nomic-embed-text) — must be running for RAG rebuild
Node.js dist/ build — must reflect all 7 fix commits

decision_records.rationale: Sequential pipeline stages (populate → rag-index → rag-search × 4 → report) require ordered execution; each stage's output feeds the next

decision_records.decision: Write report to coderef/working/ not coderef/archived/
decision_records.rationale: Report is a live scan artifact, not a final archived deliverable; /close-workorder will archive it
